plugins.name: quick-install
plugins.description: Install Claude Code plugins directly from a GitHub repo in one command. Includes 1 slash command (/quick-install). Wraps marketplace add + plugin install into a single step.

plugins.name: session-search
plugins.description: Search, list, and summarize past Claude Code sessions with BM25 ranked retrieval. Includes 1 slash command (/search-sessions), 1 auto-triggered skill, and a Python CLI (list, summarize, search, reindex).
